description: You are a Data Engineer tasked with migrating legacy data from a flat CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/concerts_raw.csv into a normalized SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/concert_bookings.db. Create a connection named 'ConcertBookings' and normalize the data into three tables: 'Venues' (VenueName, VenueCity, VenueCapacity), 'Artists' (ArtistName, ArtistGenre), and 'Concerts' (ConcertName, ConcertDate, TicketPrice, VenueId, ArtistId). Ensure reference tables contain no duplicate entries and that any staging tables used for the migration are removed.
